title: Foundation Models for Computational Pathology
subtitle: Featured thesis project
description: Benchmarking and evaluation pipeline for histopathology foundation models, combining whole-slide image representations and pathology report embeddings for cross-modal retrieval tasks.
details: In this thesis project I built the public reporting layer around a histopathology retrieval pipeline, with privacy-safe documentation and a compact global dashboard summarizing the final comparison.

title: VoxelMorph for Breast MRI Registration
subtitle: Bachelor thesis project
description: Breast MRI registration project built around VoxelMorph and a full medical-imaging workflow.
details: In this bachelor-thesis project I combined preprocessing, model adaptation and final evaluation through overlap and image-similarity metrics in a multimodal breast MRI setting.

title: Machine Learning for Classification and Regression
subtitle: Coursework portfolio
description: Supervised-learning coursework covering classification, regression and model-evaluation workflows.
details: Here I bring together binary classification, cross-validation, ROC analysis, regression modelling and PCA-based views that support interpretation.

gallery.alt: Joint PCA view used to support the regression analysis
Observed versus predicted price for the final regression model

title: Time Series Forecasting and ARIMA Modelling
subtitle: Forecasting coursework
description: Forecasting project built around smoothing models, Box-Jenkins logic and ARIMA-based prediction.
details: In this workflow I take a monthly wind-generation series from exploratory analysis to residual diagnostics, holdout evaluation and final short-horizon forecasting.

title: Neural Networks and Simulation
subtitle: Deep-learning coursework
description: Deep-learning coursework centered on training behaviour and final classification performance.
details: Here I keep the representative training dynamics, summary panels and classification outputs without exposing the original heavy local workspace.

title: Multivariate Analysis and Process Monitoring
subtitle: Exploratory analysis + PLS-DA monitoring
description: Repository combining exploratory multivariate analysis with a focused PLS-DA monitoring block.
details: I keep the broader multivariate-analysis block separate from the later monitoring branch, which is centered on PLS-DA results, diagnostics and model interpretation.

title: Production Planning and Parallel Machine Scheduling
subtitle: Operations research project
description: Scheduling project built around unrelated parallel machines, release dates, setup times, precedence constraints and shared-resource limits.
details: Here I include safe CSV instance files, benchmark-extension documentation, cleaned Python scripts and final solver-result summaries without publishing the original Excel workbooks.

title: Python Data Analysis Foundations
subtitle: Python rewrite of first-semester coursework
description: Compact Python repository on data cleaning, transformation, imputation and statistical testing.
details: I combine sleep-study exercises with Toyota-based examples for variable transformations, exploratory plots and group comparisons.

title: AWS Multimodal Feedback Pipeline
subtitle: Generative AI engineering coursework
description: End-to-end AWS pipeline for validating, enriching and formatting multimodal customer-feedback data.
details: In this implementation blueprint I cover Glue Data Quality, Lambda-based validation, Comprehend, Textract, Transcribe, SageMaker Processing and Bedrock-ready formatting for downstream analysis.

title: Design Retrieval Mechanisms for FM Augmentation
subtitle: RAG and vector-search engineering coursework
description: AWS-oriented RAG prototype for chunking, vector search, reranking and foundation-model augmentation.
details: In this project I combine document segmentation, Bedrock-based embeddings, OpenSearch and pgvector design, hybrid retrieval, query orchestration and API-ready search integration.
